description: Use this API to recall a specified bus subsystem saved in a bus subsystem file. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = bsysrcl(sid, sfile)

parameters.name: sid
parameters.description: A valid bus subsystem id. valid bus subsystem ids range from 0 to 11. (input).

error_codes.description: not a valid bus subsystem file.
items in bus subsystem file not found in working case.
